description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a central open courtyard. The exterior is clad in dark materials, with large glass windows on the front facade allowing for ample natural light. The house is surrounded by lush green trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The front features a prominent entry door with sidelights and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. Balconies with glass railings are present on both sides of the upper floor, and the rooftop includes a partially open area with seating. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, balconies, and surrounded by dense trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, and two upper balconies with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, side windows, and dense tree coverage along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, central open courtyard, and a continuous line of trees at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a side balcony, and the tree-lined perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry door with sidelights, no porch, and a clean, minimalist design
